intro:
That nagging feeling is the doorway to the truth.
Tap your way to the shocking secrets behind each baffling case!
description:
"The Shocking World Mysteries" is a tap-to-solve mystery game featuring cases that'll make you do a double-take — and more than a few bumbling criminals along the way.

Observe the crime scene illustration carefully, then simply tap wherever something looks "off" or suspicious based on the question. Trust your instincts and deductive eye to uncover the hidden truth.

"How did they get caught THERE?!" "Who even makes that mistake?!"
The perfect balance of laughs and brain-teasing — a mystery experience that's as funny as it is challenging.

No complicated controls whatsoever.
Pick up and play whenever you have a spare moment —
a mystery game packed with surprises, laughs, and those satisfying "aha!" moments.

ーーーーーーーーーーーーーーー
TT supports gaming content creators.
No permission from TT is required to stream or create gameplay content, whether for personal or commercial use.
